behaviors.description: Embedding vector dimensionality matches the vector index dimension.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS/MOCK-HIDE: a mocked embedder can hide real model-dimension drift (e.g., model/version change). REAL-INFRA: to catch production-real failures, this check should call the actual embedding provider and the real index schema endpoint/config. LLM-DEP: no model-judgment quality is needed, only shape compatibility.
behaviors.test_description: Run an API-level test against a real embedding API and real vector DB index metadata: submit a query, capture returned embedding length, read index dimension, and assert equality. Fail if embedding call succeeds but dimension mismatches index, since this causes runtime search failures in production.

behaviors.description: Similarity search returns results sorted by descending cosine similarity.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: unit tests of a sorter alone can miss handoff bugs between query vector creation, repo call, and score mapping. REAL-INFRA: no OS/subprocess/real network is strictly required if using local vector engine/fixture data. LLM-DEP: none.
behaviors.test_description: Seed a local vector store (or in-memory vector index) with fixed vectors and known expected cosine scores for a fixed query vector, execute the real search module stack (service + repository), and assert strictly non-increasing similarity scores and expected item order.

behaviors.description: LLM re-ranker changes ranking for nuanced-intent queries.
behaviors.justification: LLM-DEP: correctness depends on real LLM judgment of contextual nuance; mocked outputs can always pass and hide failures. MULTI-STEP: this is a single agentic step (re-rank), not a multi-agent pipeline.
behaviors.test_description: For a curated nuanced query and candidate set where lexical/vector order is intentionally imperfect, call the real LLM re-ranker multiple runs and assert that at least one relevant item is promoted versus raw similarity order under an acceptance criterion (e.g., target item appears in top-N more often than baseline).

behaviors.description: No-close-match queries return empty results instead of low-relevance noise.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: pure unit tests can miss threshold wiring errors between similarity scores, filtering logic, and API serialization. REAL-INFRA: can be validated with local seeded vectors and real filtering/search modules; external APIs are not required for the failure boundary.
behaviors.test_description: Seed a local vector index with domain-specific items, issue a deliberately out-of-domain query vector (or fixed embedding fixture), run real search + threshold filter + API mapping path, and assert returned list is empty when all scores fall below configured cutoff.

behaviors.description: Median end-to-end query latency remains under 2 seconds.
behaviors.justification: REAL-INFRA: latency depends on real HTTP stack, network hops, external embedding + vector DB + LLM calls, and runtime environment. MOCK-HIDE: mocked dependencies under-report latency and can hide true bottlenecks. LLM-DEP: content quality is irrelevant; timing is the target.
behaviors.test_description: Run a production-like system benchmark through the real REST endpoint with real downstream dependencies for a representative query mix, collect end-to-end timings, and assert median latency (p50) < 2000 ms over a sufficient sample window.
